summary: Render topology-backed strategic map and route decision surface
acceptance_criteria: Default player map uses topology-backed district polygons and explicit route polylines from read models; it must not synthesize player-facing territory from rectangular grid coordinates.
Polygon hit-test, district list, task rail, and inspector focus select the same active object and show consistent route/path preview reason codes.
Default overlays show only current decision-relevant routes; full route/pressure/debug overlays are opt-in and clearly labeled.
Route preview shows edge sequence, mode, estimated days, bottleneck capacity, seasonal variation, known/unknown/blocked reasons, and result feedback in localized text.
UI does not mutate WorldState directly; all state changes still go through existing GameCommand/preview/submit boundaries.
required_tests: Playwright screenshots at 1440x900 and 1280x720 proving default map no longer reads as a rectangular board
notes: This is still low-fidelity product UI, not final art production.
Use icons/legend/control patterns already accepted by the M7 UI quality track.
